hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then echo "[SDD Hook] 型チェック実行中..."; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi'
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$"; then echo "[SDD Hook] lint チェック実行中..."; npx eslint "$FILE" --max-warnings 5 2>&1 | tail -10; fi'
